title: Duquesne University Campus Tour!
body: Brasil é meu país e tenho grande orgulho em ter uma neta estudando nessa maravilhosa Universidade.Parabens a todos que dela participam
author: @angelacalabria6610

title: Duquesne University Campus Tour!
body: Hey! Im an international student. How is the chemistry program here ? Im thinking of applying this for my phd. Is the tutuon fee high ? Do they take teaching assistants ?
author: @ishish7384

title: A Day in the Life of a Duquesne Nursing Student
body: Thank you for the peek into the life of a Duquesne  nursing Student.   As a nurse it so range a bell, loved the enthusiasm and the opportunities that the student encountered.  Joyce Ross, MSN, CRNP
author: @joyceross4943

title: Day In The Life At Duquesne University (COVID EDITION)
body:
Hi Jared. I'm watching from Panama 🇵🇦.
I'm moving to Duquesne on January 2021 to start my master's program. It was nice to see your video and get familiar on how a day of university during pandemic looks like.
Keep up the good content!✌🏻
author: @jeanfrias4056

title: Day In The Life At Duquesne University (COVID EDITION)
body: This is so cool! I'm thinking I'm going to go to Duquesne in the fall but I haven't been able to go to any campuses because of the virus so it was so cool seeing this!
author: @samantha4575

title: DAY IN THE LIFE - Clinical Edition, Duquesne University Nursing
body: This was so good to watch considering the fact that I start in the fall at that school for their nursing program and I get a glimpse of it!
author: @ny13ma

title: DAY IN THE LIFE - Clinical Edition, Duquesne University Nursing
body: I’m going into pharmacy next year and while I live in Penn hills which is nothing far I really want to know what to expect
author: @blueberryzz_z
